caps.proposition_text: The clinician assesses a right knee contusion.
The clinician assesses right shoulder pain.
The patient will consider formal physical therapy if pain does not improve.

evidence.span_text: After reviewing the patient's examination and radiographic findings today, I have discussed with the patient that his x-rays did not reveal any signs of a fracture. I have recommended that we treat the patient conservatively. I have advised him to rest his right knee and apply ice 2 to 3 times per day for 20 minutes at a time. He can take non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs such as ibuprofen every 6 to 8 hours as needed for pain. If his pain does not improve with the medication, he will return to the office and we will consider formal physical therapy.
